name: alistore-erp
description: AliStore — операционная система для розничной торговли электроникой (КР)

scripts.ios:build: cd apps/ios && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild -project AliStoreNative.xcodeproj -alltargets -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug -arch arm64 ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH=YES CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:test: cd apps/ios && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild test -project AliStoreNative.xcodeproj -scheme AliStoreClient -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.ios:ui: cd apps/ios && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer xcodebuild test -project AliStoreNative.xcodeproj -scheme AliStoreUITests -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.launch:check: npm run launch:preflight:strict && npm run launch:readiness:strict
scripts.inventory:valuation:benchmark: npm run api:build && npm run benchmark:inventory-valuation -w @alistore/api
scripts.ecosystem:service-loaner:e2e: npm --prefix apps/api test -- --runInBand test/service-center.e2e-spec.ts test/service-loaner.e2e-spec.ts test/warranty-rbac.e2e-spec.ts && playwright test e2e/service-center-ui.spec.ts
scripts.ecosystem:procurement-sale:e2e: npm --prefix apps/api test -- --runInBand test/procurement.e2e-spec.ts && playwright test e2e/ecosystem-procurement-sale.spec.ts
